title: Ability to see when number is MULTIPLE OF
excerpt:

posts.author: zivencrist (Ziven)
posts.cookedHtml:
This would be a simple option addition to the number automation trigger.
It would look something like this:

When item is created
and only if NUMBER is multiple of: (pick any number)
\/
Any output

This would really help people like myself who are using numbers as a way to sort a group. It would allow custom status changes based on number multiples, instead of just a specific number. All kinds of other benefits! Surely can’t be that complicated of a change to make. Please consider this change, it would make my workflow way easier.
